name: Edge Of Galaxy
short_description: Edge of Galaxy is a space strategy and management game focused on fleet control, expansion, and survival at the frontier of a hostile sci-fi universe.
detailed_description:
Strategy and Survival at the Edge of Space

Edge of Galaxy is a space strategy game centered on exploration, expansion, and survival in a dangerous and unforgiving sci-fi universe. Players command fleets, manage resources, and make strategic decisions while operating at the very edge of known space.

The game emphasizes planning and long-term thinking rather than fast reflexes, rewarding players who enjoy systemic gameplay and careful management.

Fleet Management and Expansion

As you explore new regions, you’ll build and manage fleets, establish control over territory, and respond to threats that emerge from the unknown. Progression comes from expanding intelligently, allocating resources efficiently, and adapting to changing conditions.

Every decision affects your ability to survive and grow in a hostile environment.

A Systems-Driven Sci-Fi Experience

Edge of Galaxy focuses on mechanics, systems, and player choice. The universe is designed to feel isolated and dangerous, reinforcing the tension of operating far from safety or support.

This is a single-player strategy experience intended for players who enjoy thoughtful pacing, exploration, and emergent gameplay rather than scripted missions.

Key Features

  • Space strategy gameplay focused on exploration and expansion

  • Fleet management and resource control

  • Survival mechanics in a hostile sci-fi setting

  • Systems-driven progression and player choice

  • Sandbox-style gameplay with replay value

  • Single-player strategic experience
